summary: Tested notification system bug fixes for i'M On Social CRM app. All three issues verified FIXED: 1) Notification bell NO LONGER crashes when clicked (getNotifColor fix - was referencing undefined 'colors' at module scope), 2) Notification center API returns proper deep links with prefill params, 3) Demo requests create notifications for admins with form_details. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Notification bell works without crash, dropdown opens correctly.

notification_bell_crash_fix.details: Notification bell clicks without crash. getNotifColor now returns proper hex color strings instead of referencing undefined 'colors' variable.

notification_center_api.details: GET /api/notification-center/{user_id} returns 200 with proper structure including notifications, unread_count, category_counts

notification_center_category_filters.details: Category filters (leads, tasks, campaigns, activity) work correctly

campaign_send_links.details: Campaign send notifications link to /contact/{id}?prefill={message} with URL-encoded message content

task_notifications_links.details: Task overdue/due_soon notifications link to /contact/{id}?prefill={description} when contact_id present

demo_request_notifications.details: POST /api/demo-requests creates notifications with type='new_lead' for admins, includes form_details field

lead_notifications_link.details: New lead notifications link to /admin/lead-tracking as expected

contact_page_prefill_handling.details: Contact detail page (lines 243, 372-380) properly handles prefill and channel query params to pre-populate composer

notification_dropdown_ui.details: Notification dropdown opens, displays notifications, category filters clickable, View All button visible

frontend_no_console_errors.details: No 'colors undefined' errors in browser console when clicking notification bell

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.tsx (lines 42-59): getNotifColor now properly returns hex color strings for all notification types including default case - NO LONGER references undefined 'colors' variable
notifications_center.py (lines 100-102, 130-131, 234-235): Tasks and campaign sends now include prefill parameter with URL-encoded description/message
demo_requests.py (lines 188-208): Creates notifications with form_details for admins when demo request submitted
contact/[id].tsx (lines 243, 372-380): Handles prefill and channel query params correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Notification bell works, dropdown opens, no crashes)

seed_data_creation: Created test demo requests during testing for notification verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system bug fixes verified working: 1) getNotifColor no longer crashes (was referencing undefined 'colors' at module scope), 2) Notification center API returns proper deep-links with prefill params for campaign sends and tasks, 3) Demo requests create notifications for admins with full form details. The notification bell is at position (1884, 32) on the page. All notification types render properly with correct icons and colors.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
